name: cursor-usage-for-teams
description: Show Cursor monthly usage for teams in the status bar.

commands.title: Cursor Monthly Usage: Clear Stored Token
Cursor Monthly Usage: Toggle Daily / Total View

markdownEnumDescriptions: Usage for the whole billing period — used, limit, and remaining.
Budget per usage day — how much you can spend each day you work without exhausting the period before it ends.
cursorUsageForTeams.view.markdownDescription: **What** the status bar shows. Pair it with **Format** below. You can flip this at any time with the command **Cursor Monthly Usage: Toggle Daily / Total View** (keeps the chosen format, no extra API call).

markdownEnumDescriptions: How many dollars are left. Monthly: `$76.93 left`. Daily: `$3.33/day left` (headroom for today).
Two values side by side. Monthly: `$73.07 / $150.00` (used / limit). Daily: `$5.22 / $8.55 per day` (average / recommended).
Percent of the budget still free. Monthly: `51% left`. Daily: `39% left` (of the daily budget).
cursorUsageForTeams.format.markdownDescription: **How** the number is formatted. Applies to both the **Monthly** and **Daily** views.

cursorUsageForTeams.usageDays.markdownDescription: Weekdays you actually use the AI (add weekends if you work then). The extension counts only these days when computing elapsed/remaining usage days and the recommended daily budget. Empty or invalid values fall back to Monday–Friday.

markdownEnumDescriptions: **Adaptive** — `remaining ÷ remaining usage days`. Self-corrects as you spend so you finish the period on budget. e.g. `$76.93 ÷ 9 = $8.55/day`.
**Fixed** — `limit ÷ total usage days in the period`. A constant daily target for the whole month. e.g. `$150.00 ÷ 22 = $6.82/day`.
cursorUsageForTeams.dailyBudgetStrategy.markdownDescription: Formula for the **recommended spend per usage day** shown in the **Daily pacing** view.

cursorUsageForTeams.warningRemainingPerc.markdownDescription: Status bar background turns **warning** when the remaining budget drops to this percent or below — in the **total** view (period remaining) or the **daily** view (daily headroom).

cursorUsageForTeams.criticalRemainingPer.markdownDescription: Status bar background turns **error** when the remaining budget drops to this percent or below. Should be lower than **Warning Remaining Percent**.

cursorUsageForTeams.pollIntervalSeconds.markdownDescription: How often to fetch fresh usage from the Cursor API in the background (minimum 60 seconds).

cursorUsageForTeams.apiBaseUrl.markdownDescription: HTTPS origin for `GET /api/usage-summary`. Your session cookie is sent only to this host. **Machine** scoped — set in user settings only, never overridden by a workspace. Change only if you trust the origin.

cursorUsageForTeams.enableLocalTokenDisc.markdownDescription: Read your Cursor login from local `state.vscdb` so the extension can authenticate automatically. Disable if you prefer to paste a token with **Cursor Monthly Usage: Set Token**. **Machine** scoped so a workspace cannot toggle credential discovery.
